name: Sofa
description:
Client is a single mother caring for her 9-year-old daughter and is currently dependent on ComCare assistance to meet the family's basic needs.

Following an incident involving her ex-partner, essential kitchen fixtures, including the kitchen cabinet and gas stove, were damaged and are no longer usable. As client has limited financial means and is prioritising her daughter's daily needs and household expenses, she is unable to replace these items independently.

The loss of these kitchen facilities has affected the family's ability to prepare meals safely and conveniently at home. Donations of a kitchen cabinet and gas stove, or suitable replacement items, would help restore a safe and functional living environment while alleviating the family's financial strain during this challenging period.

passiton.name: Sofa bed
passiton.location: Ardmore, Balmoral, Bukit Timah, Grange Road, Holland Road, Orchard Boulevard, Tanglin

passiton.name: 2 Sofas with washable covers + extra cover set (Cosimo)
passiton.description:
- Two Comfortable 2-seater sofas
- Each sofa is 250cm (L) x 100 cm (W) x 40cm (H)
- Great for living rooms and entertainment areas
- Easy to customize and arrange
- The backrests can be moved as you like or completely removed to convert each sofa to a temporary bed.
- 2 cover sets available - dark brown and green. So you can use one cover set while one cover set goes for dry cleaning. One cover set dry cleaned and packed already.
- Original price with extra cover set - S$ 2700
- Bought from Cosimo

passiton.name: red sofa bed
passiton.description: red sofa bed opens to a single bed
passiton.location: Chancery , Dunearn Road, Moulmein, Newton, Novena, Thomson, Watten Estate

name: Sofa
description: Client (F/33) is the sole breadwinner of her household and is currently living with her five children. She is seeking assistance in the form of a sofa for her family, as she is currently unable to afford this essential household furniture.

name: Adult diapers
description: Client is a senior caregiver to her adult child with special needs. She is unemployed and is the main caregiver to her child and also husband with a history of stroke and heart conditions. With financial restrains, the family will benefit greatly from a sponsor for her child's diapers as they are a regular expense.

name: Nebulizer Machine
description: Client lives alone and has limited family support. She has been unemployed since 2014 due to asthma. Client reported ongoing depression and chronic skin condition since 2017, with no significant improvement despite ongoing medical treatment. Client shared that her doctor recommended the use of a nebulizer machine; however, she is unable to purchase one due to lack of income.(JM)

contact.org: THK Family Service Centre @ Bedok North
contact.name: Low Kim Yong

passiton.name: Suction machine and nebulizer
passiton.description: Bought for 2 years but used once only.

name: Diapers
description: Client lives in a 4-room HDB flat with her elderly parents, husband and their four young children, aged 11, 6, 5 and 1. The family is currently facing financial challenges due to bankruptcy and the monthly household income is insufficient to meet the family's basic needs. Family is seeking support for essential items such as Drypers Superdry Pants XL for their young child. For further liaison, kindly WhatsApp me at 98598768, I will respond from 9am to 5pm on weekdays. Thank you very much!

name: Cot
description: Client requested for a cot for her youngest child as she had thrown the cot away after it was spoiled due to the pressure after her older child jumped on it. Client reported that while she had attempted to get child to sleep with her in the bunk bed, child reportedly refused to do so and is unable to sleep. Client is currently unemployed and is reliant on the Comcare assistance for their basic needs and is unable to afford a new washing machine.

name: Diapers
description: Client lives in a 4-room HDB flat with her elderly parents, husband and their four young children, aged 11, 6, 5 and 1. The family is currently facing financial challenges due to bankruptcy and the monthly household income is insufficient to meet the family's basic needs. Family is seeking support for essential items such as Drypers Superdry Pants XL for their young child. For further liaison, kindly WhatsApp me at 98598768, I will respond from 9am to 5pm on weekdays. Thank you very much!

name: Desk Fan
description:
This family of four is living on a household income of approximately $1,900 per month and faces ongoing challenges meeting daily expenses and basic household needs.

One of their immediate needs is a desk fan to improve airflow in their home. As the family sleeps on mattresses placed on the floor, their existing standing fan is unable to adequately reach their 14-year-old son, leaving him uncomfortable, especially during warm weather.

A donated desk fan would provide much-needed ventilation and help create a more comfortable environment during their slumber.

passiton.name: Desk fan
passiton.description:
Fan can work but cannot swivel. 
Self-collect at my HDB block lobby.

name: Bicycle
description:
Client is a breast cancer survivor, has recently completed her treatment and suffered from multiple side effects (heart issues and swelling of eyes and nose). While her condition has improved, she is facing difficulties securing employment that is fit for her current condition.

Client is unemployed, living in a 1-room rental flat and without any family support. She hopes for a bicycle to allow her to do Grab to provide for herself.

passiton.name: Exercise Bicycle  (non-electric)
passiton.description: Simple exercise bicycle with handlebars and feet pedals. Height of bike is adjustable.
passiton.location: Eunos, Geylang, Kembangan, Paya Lebar , Sims

name: Bicycle
description: Couple is diagnosed with mild ID and previously uses an e-bike for grab delivery to sustain monthly expenses. Both parents are also supporting their child diagnosed with global developmental delay. However, as their e-bike has previously broken down, this has affected their monthly income. Hence, it would be beneficial for parents to own a bicycle to assist with grab deliveries.

contact.org: Care Corner Family Service Centre - Woodlands
contact.name: Joel Low

passiton.name: Exercise Bicycle  (non-electric)
passiton.description: Simple exercise bicycle with handlebars and feet pedals. Height of bike is adjustable.
passiton.location: Eunos, Geylang, Kembangan, Paya Lebar , Sims

name: Laptop
description: Client is unemployed due to caregiving responsibilities for 2 children in tertiary education and family members with mental health needs and special needs. One of the child in polytechnic requires a new laptop after his existing one spoilt.

contact.org: Allkin Family Service Centre @ Cheng San 445
contact.name: Frank Lye Wei Bin

passiton.name: Laptop bag
passiton.description: Acer laptop bag. Was a free gift with laptop but never used.

name: Laptop
description: Family consists of 2 secondary school going children. Client is medically unfit for employment and her husband's monthly income is inadequate to meet family needs. 1 of the children's laptop has broke down and he is no longer able to use it for his school work. Family hopes to receive a laptop so that he may have access to complete his schoolwork timely for submission.

contact.org: Allkin Family Service Centre @ Cheng San 445
contact.name: Frank Lye Wei Bin

passiton.name: Laptop bag
passiton.description: Acer laptop bag. Was a free gift with laptop but never used.

name: Diapers
description: The client is an elderly lady who is a stroke survivor. She lives with her husband in a 2-room HDB rental flat. Although her husband is also ageing, he remains the sole breadwinner of the family. However, he struggles to maintain the monthly household expenses with his low income. The client needs to have adult pull-up/pants diapers, sized XL, to reduce fall risk at home.

name: Wheelchair
description: Client (F/62) is currently residing with her granddaughter (F/13) and is unable to work due to ongoing health conditions. As her mobility has significantly deteriorated and she is no longer able to walk independently, she is seeking assistance in obtaining an adult wheelchair to support her daily mobility and improve her quality of life.

contact.org: THK Family Service Centre @ Tanjong Pagar
contact.name: Norlizawati Binte Hamid
